ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "accel_x" REAL /* X-axis acceleration value */,
  "accel_y" REAL /* Y-axis acceleration value */,
  "accel_z" REAL /* Z-axis acceleration value */,
  "gyro_x" REAL /* X-axis gyroscope value */,
  "gyro_y" REAL /* Y-axis gyroscope value */,
  "gyro_z" REAL /* Z-axis gyroscope value */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., Respeck) */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., Falling on the right) */,
  "activity_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the activity type */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the subject wearing the sensor */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "sampling_rate" REAL /* Sampling rate of the sensor data */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Quality of the sensor data (e.g., signal strength, noise level) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session to which the sensor data belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_activity_type FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type") REFERENCES activities ("activity_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the subject */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the subject */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the subject */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Consent status indicating whether the subject has given consent to participate */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history of the subject */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the subject's emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., Respeck) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date of deployment of the sensor */,
  "battery_life" REAL /* Battery life of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., Falling on the right) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the activity type */,
  "activity_duration" REAL /* Typical duration of the activity */,
  "activity_intensity" REAL /* Intensity level of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the subject in the session */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the sensor used in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "protocol_id" TEXT /* ID of the protocol or study to which the session belongs */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution to which the user belongs */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the data point */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each data access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the data point accessed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)
